narrative: RBA rate hike to 4.35% and Trump comments on Iran negotiations drive a complex risk-premium bid—AUD/USD firms to 0.7189 while oil supply concerns support gold higher +0.76% near $4,568. USD/JPY bids to 157.88 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the dominant anchor despite geopolitical headlines; equities +0.97%; DXY +0.25%; VIX 17.2. Watch RBNZ rate decision on May 27 for the next high-impact APAC policy catalyst.
